name: Alchemist
description: Masters of alchemy who craft bombs and potent elixirs. Alchemists use explosives and transmutation to devastate foes and enhance allies.

classFeatures.name: Alchemy
classFeatures.description: Create alchemical items and mutagens.

classFeatures.name: Bomb
classFeatures.description: Create ranged weapons using alchemical force.

classFeatures.name: Poison Use
classFeatures.description: Trained in use of poisons without poisoning yourself.

classFeatures.name: Mutagen
classFeatures.description: Create potions that grant supernatural enhancements.

name: Arcanist
description: Skilled arcane casters who blend wizardry and sorcery. Arcanists gain exploits and can spontaneously cast known spells.

classFeatures.name: Arcane Reservoir
classFeatures.description: Store arcane power in a reservoir for special abilities.

classFeatures.name: Arcane Exploits
classFeatures.description: Gain powerful exploits to modify spellcasting.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast both prepared and spontaneous arcane spells.

classFeatures.name: Fast Movement
classFeatures.description: Barbarian's base speed is 10 feet faster than normal.

classFeatures.name: Rage
classFeatures.description: Gain bonuses to Str/Con and Will saves while raging.

classFeatures.name: Rage Power
classFeatures.description: Gain a rage power to use while raging.

classFeatures.name: Uncanny Dodge
classFeatures.description: Cannot be caught flat-footed and retains Dex bonus when invisible enemy attacks.

classFeatures.name: Trap Sense
classFeatures.description: Gain bonus on Reflex saves against traps and AC vs trap attacks.

classFeatures.name: Improved Uncanny Dodge
classFeatures.description: Cannot be flanked unless attacker has 4+ more rogue levels.

classFeatures.name: Damage Reduction
classFeatures.description: Reduce all weapon damage taken by 1.

classFeatures.name: Greater Rage
classFeatures.description: Rage bonuses increase to +6 Str/Con and +3 Will.

classFeatures.name: Indomitable Will
classFeatures.description: Gain +4 bonus on Will saves against enchantment while raging.

classFeatures.name: Tireless Rage
classFeatures.description: No longer become fatigued at the end of rage.

classFeatures.name: Mighty Rage
classFeatures.description: Rage bonuses increase to +8 Str/Con and +4 Will.

classFeatures.name: Spells
classFeatures.description: Bard can cast arcane spells from the bard spell list.

classFeatures.name: Bardic Knowledge
classFeatures.description: Add half class level to all Knowledge checks and make them untrained.

classFeatures.name: Bardic Performance
classFeatures.description: Use Perform skill to create magical effects for 4 + Cha mod rounds per day.

classFeatures.name: Countersong
classFeatures.description: Counter magic effects that depend on sound.

classFeatures.name: Distraction
classFeatures.description: Counter magic effects that depend on sight.

classFeatures.name: Fascinate
classFeatures.description: Fascinate one or more creatures with performance.

classFeatures.name: Inspire Courage
classFeatures.description: Inspire allies with +1 bonus vs fear and damage.

classFeatures.name: Versatile Performance
classFeatures.description: Use Perform bonus in place of related skill bonus.

classFeatures.name: Well-Versed
classFeatures.description: +4 bonus on saves against bardic performance and sonic effects.

classFeatures.name: Inspire Competence
classFeatures.description: Help an ally succeed at a skill check.

classFeatures.name: Lore Master
classFeatures.description: Can take 10 on any Knowledge check once per day.

classFeatures.name: Suggestion
classFeatures.description: Make a reasonable suggestion that targets will follow.

classFeatures.name: Fast Performance
classFeatures.description: Start bardic performance as move action.

classFeatures.name: Inspire Greatness
classFeatures.description: Inspire allies with extra hit dice and bonuses.

classFeatures.name: Peerless Performer
classFeatures.description: Bardic performance bonuses double.

classFeatures.name: Swift Performance
classFeatures.description: Start bardic performance as swift action.

classFeatures.name: Inspire Heroics
classFeatures.description: Inspire allies with heroic abilities.

classFeatures.name: Master Performer
classFeatures.description: Can maintain multiple bardic performances simultaneously.

name: Bloodrager
description: Fighters touched by bloodline magic who rage like barbarians. Bloodragers gain spell casting and bloodline powers while raging.

classFeatures.name: Bloodrager Bloodline
classFeatures.description: Gain power from a magical bloodline.

classFeatures.name: Bloodrage
classFeatures.description: Enter rage fueled by bloodline magic.

classFeatures.name: Bonus Bloodline Feat
classFeatures.description: Gain a feat based on your bloodline.

name: Brawler
description: Martial experts trained in unarmed combat and improvised weapons. Brawlers gain martial flexibility to switch styles mid-combat.

classFeatures.name: Martial Flexibility
classFeatures.description: Change combat feats as swift actions.

classFeatures.name: Unarmed Strike
classFeatures.description: Increased damage with unarmed strikes.

name: Cavalier
description: Noble mounted warriors bound by oath to their order. Cavaliers gain powerful charge abilities and teamwork feats with allies.

classFeatures.name: Order
classFeatures.description: Swear oath to an order.

classFeatures.name: Mounted Bond
classFeatures.description: Form special bond with a mount.

classFeatures.name: Cavalier's Charge
classFeatures.description: Gain bonuses when charging from horseback.

classFeatures.name: Aura
classFeatures.description: Emit an aura of power around the Cleric.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells prepared from cleric spell list.

classFeatures.name: Channel Energy
classFeatures.description: Channel positive/negative energy to heal or harm.

classFeatures.name: Domains
classFeatures.description: Choose two domains granting additional powers and bonus spells.

classFeatures.name: Orisons
classFeatures.description: Can prepare unlimited 0-level spells.

classFeatures.name: Bonus Feat
classFeatures.description: Gain a bonus combat feat.

classFeatures.name: Channel Energy (improved)
classFeatures.description: Channel energy increases in power.

classFeatures.name: Divine Presence
classFeatures.description: Powerful aura grants bonuses to allies near cleric.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells from druid spell list.

classFeatures.name: Druidic
classFeatures.description: Can read, write, and speak Druidic.

classFeatures.name: Orisons
classFeatures.description: Can prepare unlimited 0-level spells.

classFeatures.name: Nature Bond
classFeatures.description: Form a bond with nature (animal companion or domain).

classFeatures.name: Nature Sense
classFeatures.description: Know direction and determine pure water by smell.

classFeatures.name: Wild Empathy
classFeatures.description: Improve attitude of animals with Charisma check.

classFeatures.name: Woodland Stride
classFeatures.description: Move through natural difficult terrain normally.

classFeatures.name: Trackless Step
classFeatures.description: Leave no track when moving through natural terrain.

classFeatures.name: Resist Nature's Lure
classFeatures.description: Save bonuses against effects from fey and plants.

classFeatures.name: Wild Shape
classFeatures.description: Assume the form of an animal.

classFeatures.name: Wild Shape (elemental)
classFeatures.description: Can wild shape into elementals.

classFeatures.name: Venom Immunity
classFeatures.description: Immune to poison and disease.

classFeatures.name: A Thousand Faces
classFeatures.description: Assume the appearance of any humanoid.

classFeatures.name: Master Shapeshift
classFeatures.description: Gain the ability to shapeshift at will.

name: Fighter
features: Bonus Combat Feat (1st, every even level)

classFeatures.name: Bonus Combat Feat
classFeatures.description: Gain bonus combat feats at 1st level and every even level.

classFeatures.name: Weapon Training
classFeatures.description: Gain bonus with certain weapon groups.

classFeatures.name: Bravery
classFeatures.description: Gain save bonus vs fear effects.

classFeatures.name: Armor Training
classFeatures.description: Reduce armor check penalty and increase speed.

classFeatures.name: Weapon Mastery
classFeatures.description: Increased critical threat range with certain weapons.

classFeatures.name: Indomitable
classFeatures.description: Reroll a saving throw once per day.

classFeatures.name: Fighter's Resolve
classFeatures.description: Fight at full strength even when badly wounded.

classFeatures.name: Armor Mastery
classFeatures.description: Armor provides additional benefits.

classFeatures.name: Weapon Legend
classFeatures.description: Weapons function as if they are lawful, neutral, and good.

name: Hunter
description: Wilderness warriors with animal companion and spellcasting. Hunters combine ranger versatility with druid animal bond abilities.

classFeatures.name: Animal Companion
classFeatures.description: Form bond with animal companion.

classFeatures.name: Wild Empathy
classFeatures.description: Communicate and influence animals.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells.

name: Inquisitor
description: Holy agents of faith who hunt heresy and punish the wicked. Inquisitors gain judgments and specialized combat abilities.

classFeatures.name: Monster Lore
classFeatures.description: Bonus to knowledge checks about creatures.

classFeatures.name: Judgment
classFeatures.description: Grant yourself divine bonuses for 1 minute.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells.

name: Investigator
description: Brilliant detectives and scholars with investigative talents. Investigators gain alchemy talents and deduction bonus.

classFeatures.name: Keen Recollection
classFeatures.description: Make knowledge checks untrained.

classFeatures.name: Investigator Talents
classFeatures.description: Gain special investigative abilities.

classFeatures.name: Alchemy
classFeatures.description: Create alchemical items.

classFeatures.name: Bonus Feat
classFeatures.description: Gain bonus feats at 1st level and every 4 levels.

classFeatures.name: Flurry of Blows
classFeatures.description: Make additional attacks with unarmed strikes or special weapons.

classFeatures.name: Unarmed Strike
classFeatures.description: Unarmed attacks deal increased damage.

classFeatures.name: AC Bonus
classFeatures.description: Add Wisdom modifier to AC while unarmored.

classFeatures.name: Evasion
classFeatures.description: Avoid damage from area effects with successful Reflex save.

classFeatures.name: Ki Pool
classFeatures.description: Pool of ki points to power special abilities.

classFeatures.name: Bonus Feat
classFeatures.description: Gain additional bonus feat.

classFeatures.name: Still Mind
classFeatures.description: Gain save bonus against enchantment spells.

classFeatures.name: Ki Power

classFeatures.name: Purity of Body
classFeatures.description: Immunity to disease.

classFeatures.name: Wholeness of Body
classFeatures.description: Heal damage by spending ki.

classFeatures.name: Improved Evasion
classFeatures.description: Take only half damage on failed Reflex saves.

classFeatures.name: Diamond Body
classFeatures.description: Immunity to poisons.

classFeatures.name: Diamond Soul
classFeatures.description: Spell resistance equal to 10 + monk level.

classFeatures.name: Quivering Palm
classFeatures.description: Strike a fatal pressure point on a creature.

classFeatures.name: Timeless Body
classFeatures.description: Cease aging and gain immunity to aging effects.

classFeatures.name: Empty Body
classFeatures.description: Gain the benefits of invisibility and gaseous form.

classFeatures.name: Perfect Self
classFeatures.description: Become immune to all diseases and poisons.

name: Oracle
description: Mysterious divine casters touched by otherworldly power. Oracles gain mysteria revelations and spontaneous casting.

classFeatures.name: Oracle Curse
classFeatures.description: Cursed with power, gaining curse and abilities.

classFeatures.name: Oracle Mystery
classFeatures.description: Gain divine power from a mystery.

classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells spontaneously.

classFeatures.description: Add Charisma modifier to all saving throws.

classFeatures.description: Heal allies or deal damage to undead by touch.

classFeatures.name: Divine Health

classFeatures.name: Holy Weapon

classFeatures.description: Grant damage reduction to allies nearby.

classFeatures.name: Aura of Faith
classFeatures.description: Grant saving throw bonus to allies.

classFeatures.name: Aura of Despair

classFeatures.name: Wild Empathy
classFeatures.description: Improve attitude of animals.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells after 4th level.

classFeatures.description: Gain a bonus combat feat.

classFeatures.description: Hide in natural terrain even without cover.

classFeatures.description: Avoid damage from area effects.

classFeatures.name: Hide in Plain Sight
classFeatures.description: Remain hidden even when observed.

classFeatures.name: Improved Evasion
classFeatures.description: Take only half damage on failed Reflex saves.

classFeatures.description: Master of hunting and combat in the wild.

classFeatures.description: Gain bonus to find and disable traps.

classFeatures.description: Avoid damage from area effects with successful Reflex save.

classFeatures.description: Gain bonuses against traps.

name: Shaman
description: Spiritual healers communing with nature spirits. Shamans gain spirits and can spontaneously cast healing spells.

classFeatures.description: Bonded with a spirit.

classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells spontaneously.

classFeatures.name: Spirit Animal Companion
classFeatures.description: Gain animal companion.

name: Skald
description: Battle-hardened bards who inspire allies in combat. Skalds gain rage powers and can share performance bonuses with party.

classFeatures.name: Weapon and Armor Proficiency
classFeatures.description: Proficient with common weapons and armor.

classFeatures.name: Bardic Performance
classFeatures.description: Inspire allies through performance.

classFeatures.name: Rage Power
classFeatures.description: Gain rage powers like a barbarian.

description: Deadly assassins and monster hunters with studied targets. Slayers gain sneak attack and specialization against chosen foes.

classFeatures.description: Study chosen target, gaining bonuses against it.

classFeatures.name: Sneak Attack
classFeatures.description: Gain sneak attack damage.

classFeatures.description: Gain divine blessings from deity.
